raw_title: AI in the German Media: Narratives of AI-in-Particular and AI-in-General in German Media Reporting About Artificial Intelligence
title_en: AI in the German Media: Narratives of AI-in-Particular and AI-in-General in German Media Reporting About Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 德国媒体中的AI：德国媒体关于人工智能报道中的特定AI与一般AI叙事
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究分析了德国媒体如何报道人工智能，特别关注媒体如何区分和描述特定AI应用与一般AI概念的不同叙事方式。
plain_summary_en: This study analyzes how German media reports on artificial intelligence, focusing specifically on how media distinguishes and describes different narratives about specific AI applications versus general AI concepts.
research_direction_zh: 媒体与科技叙事研究，关注人工智能在公共话语中的呈现方式及其社会影响。
research_direction_en: Media and technology narrative research, focusing on how artificial intelligence is presented in public discourse and its social implications.
